doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: Document is dated March 2026 (future date), makes legally implausible claims that pseudonymized data can fall outside GDPR scope for processors while remaining in scope for controllers, and lacks authentic EDPB publication characteristics.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document is dated March 2026 (a future date from the current perspective), contains internally inconsistent legal claims (processors holding pseudonymized data outside GDPR scope while controllers holding same data remain in scope contradicts established EDPB jurisprudence), and lacks verifiable official EDPB publication characteristics or cross-reference specificity typical of genuine guidance notes.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: Document is dated March 2026 (future date), makes legally implausible claims that pseudonymized data can fall outside GDPR scope for processors while remaining in scope for controllers, and lacks authentic EDPB publication characteristics.
